text:

From-To: open->feedback

Hello, 

First of all apologies for not getting back to you sooner. Can you please tell me whether 
this is still an issue with portaudit (or more preferred pkg audit) ? I might have some 
time to look at this but I first want to be sure that it is still a problem. 

Thanks! 
Remko
